name: Hisham Sarwar
bio: Pioneer freelancer, tech evangelist, and co-founder of BeingGuru. Hisham has trained over 1 million freelancers globally on freelancing, programming, and AI.

seo.title: Hisham Sarwar — Freelancing Pioneer and Tech Trainer
seo.description: Learn freelancing, AI development, and client acquisition techniques from pioneer mentor Hisham Sarwar.
